name: Joker
personality: Enigmatic and capricious, Joker follows no rules—not even their own. They're equally likely to help or hinder, keeping everyone off-balance.
strategy: Defies categorization by design. Joker might sacrifice everything for a joke one round, then mastermind a flawless victory the next. Their unpredictability makes them impossible to counter, but also impossible to truly trust.
catchphrase: The only rule is: there are no rules.
